  • Uses of Bus in microsim.simulation.component

    Fields in microsim.simulation.component declared as Bus
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Bus
    SimulationComponent.bus
    Reference to the communication bus the component is mounted on.
    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component with parameters of type Bus
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SimulationComponent(Bus bus, Simulation simulation)
    Instantiates component, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted to and the simulation it belongs to.

  • Uses of Bus in microsim.simulation.component.bus

    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component.bus with parameters of type Bus
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    TSLine(Bus bus, Simulation simulation)
    Constructs a TSLine taking a reference to the bus it makes up.

  • Uses of Bus in microsim.simulation.component.device

    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component.device with parameters of type Bus
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    IoDevice(Bus bus, Simulation simulation, int base, int ports)
    Instantiates device, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted on, the base address it should respond from and the number of ports it offers.
     
    ThreadedIoDevice(Bus bus, Simulation simulation, int base, int ports)
    Instantiates device, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted on, the base address it should respond from and the number of ports it offers..
